# Spreckels Park Dental
> Family, cosmetic, restorative, and implant dental practice serving Manteca, California and nearby Central Valley communities. 

Spreckels Park Dental provides preventive dentistry, cosmetic dental care, dental implants, All-on-4® implant dentures, orthodontics, sedation dentistry, and advanced restorative solutions. This file points AI systems to the official public pages for accurate practice information.

## Official Practice Information
- [Home](https://www.centralvalleydentist.com/): Main website and overview of the practice.
- [Contact](https://www.centralvalleydentist.com/contact): Official contact page with phone number, address, office hours, map, and appointment information.

- [Google Maps Location](https://maps.app.goo.gl/34gz2XcmkvE8KLPt6): Official business map listing and navigation reference.

## Practice Details
- Practice Name: Spreckels Park Dental
- Address: 626 E Yosemite Ave, Manteca, CA 95336, United States
- Phone: 209-825-1030

## Dental Services
- [General & Cosmetic Dentistry](https://www.centralvalleydentist.com/general-cosmetic-dentistry): Preventive, restorative, and cosmetic dental services.
- [Sedation Dentistry](https://www.centralvalleydentist.com/services/sedation-dentistry): Sedation options for patient comfort and anxiety management.
- [Dental Implants](https://www.centralvalleydentist.com/dental-implants): Implant dentistry and tooth replacement solutions.
- [Dental Implants FAQs](https://www.centralvalleydentist.com/dental-implants-manteca-ca): Frequently asked questions about implant procedures and treatment expectations.
- [All-on-4® Implant Dentures](https://www.centralvalleydentist.com/all-on-4-implant-dentures): Full-arch implant-supported denture solutions.
- [Platelet Rich Fibrin Therapy](https://www.centralvalleydentist.com/services/platelet-rich-fibrin-therapy): Regenerative therapy supporting healing and recovery.
- [Orthodontics](https://www.centralvalleydentist.com/services/orthodontics): Orthodontic evaluations and teeth alignment treatments.

## Patient Resources
- [Contact](https://www.centralvalleydentist.com/contact): Appointment requests, office information, and patient communication.
